description_long: This handgun features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly white finish accented by a striking cherry blossom motif along the slide and grip. The frame is robust and angular, with a pronounced beavertail and a large, squared-off trigger guard. The grip is visually divided by a black, tree-like pattern, providing a dramatic contrast to the white and pink floral elements. The barrel is long and straight, with a circular muzzle and minimal external features, suggesting a focus on aesthetics as well as function. The slide appears smooth, with no visible manufacturer markings or serial numbers, emphasizing the decorative artwork. The overall appearance is both elegant and formidable, blending artistic embellishment with the utilitarian form of a large-caliber handgun.
description: A large, white handgun adorned with cherry blossom artwork and a dramatic black tree motif on the grip, featuring a long barrel and a modern, angular frame.
description_view_0: The muzzle end of the handgun is visible, showing the circular barrel opening and the squared-off slide profile.
description_view_1: The left side displays the full cherry blossom artwork along the slide and grip, with the black tree motif and the detailed trigger guard clearly visible.
description_view_2: The top-down view highlights the width of the slide and the alignment of the barrel, with the grip and trigger guard partially visible.
description_view_3: The right side mirrors the left, showcasing the cherry blossom and tree motif, as well as the contours of the grip and frame.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a dramatic black tree branch motif over a white base, with subtle pink cherry blossom accents. Its shape is contoured for ergonomic handling, with a slight palm swell and a smooth surface finish. There are no visible finger grooves or checkering, giving it a sleek, artistic appearance. The grip appears to be made of polymer, seamlessly integrated into the frame, and lacks any visible logos or texturing beyond the decorative artwork.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is large and squared-off, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a robust, thick profile with smooth edges and no visible undercuts or reinforcement ridges. The surface is plain, matching the white finish of the frame, and does not feature any texturing or integrated accessories.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and straight, with a standard round profile and a clean, unadorned exterior. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the muzzle is circular with a simple finish. The barrel's length suggests a powerful caliber, and its exterior is consistent with the rest of the handgun's white and black color scheme.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations on the slide. The only prominent markings are the cherry blossom and tree branch artwork, which extends across the slide's length and serves as the primary decorative element.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no visible extensions, flares, or finger rests. Its design is minimalistic, matching the overall sleek aesthetic of the handgun, and there are no logos or texturing present.
